title: Beef Bourguignon in a French Beef Bowl
description: A hearty, French-inspired beef stew served in a large bowl, rich with flavors of red wine and herbs.

ingredients.name: Beef
ingredients.notes: Chuck or round cut into 2-inch cubes

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.notes: Dry red wine, such as Burgundy

instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and sear the beef in batches until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil and sauté the onion, carrot, and celery until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, and parsley.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Braise the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Skim off excess fat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over crusty bread or in a large bowl.
